channel.title: quit on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in quit on IT notes

item.title: Python quit unexpectedly macOS Catalina
item.description: When running something depending on OpenSSL you may get something like this on macOS 10.15.2: The output of the report: To fix: brew reinstall openssl Then: cd /usr/local/lib sudo ln -s /usr/local/opt/openssl/lib/libssl.dylib libssl.dylib sudo ln -s /usr/local/opt/openssl/lib/libcrypto.dylib libcrypto.dylib

item.title: ctrl-backslash
item.description: To send a quit signal to the process: ctrl-\ # (backslash) This will send a SIGQUIT
